_doc: Live Meta comment-to-DM automations for @golden_home_project. Content engine MUST pick a keyword from `entries` whose status='live' when generating a reel — using a keyword whose automation isn't live silently drops the entire DM funnel. Add a new entry only after creating the matching automation in Meta Business Suite (https://business.facebook.com/latest/inbox/automated_responses?asset_id=973754055831729&business_id=1580899273211540). Verify ASIN is alive on amazon.com BEFORE adding (use Chrome /dp/<ASIN> + check title not 'Page Not Found'). Tag = goldenhomep06-20.

entries.reroute_reason: Impact direct merchant — link routes to eliandelm.com (verified 2026-05-04). Genuine ~20% direct merchant commission, ~6x Amazon's 3% home category rate. This is the only true high-commission reroute in the registry.

entries.reroute_reason: Impact link routes via Amazon Maas to amazon.com/stores/MammaMiaCovers (branded storefront). Verified 2026-05-04 — commission rate is Amazon's standard ~3-4% home category, NOT 20-30% as originally claimed. The actual lever is conversion (curated brand storefront beats search URL by ~3-5x), not commission rate.
